title: Penicillaria italica
taxonomy: Penicillaria italica is classified within the family Poaceae, which includes other grasses. It belongs to the tribe Andropogoneae. The species is further categorized as a member of the genus Penicillaria. Penicillaria italica is a type of grass commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is native to parts of Asia, specifically in countries such as India and Sri Lanka.
